---
title: "Closing the Outreach Gap: Analyzing Severe Depression Patient Journeys"
description: "Healthcare data analysis highlighting system gaps for severe depression patients and offering a standardized programmatic solution."
image: "health.jpg"
---

## Project Deliverables

:::: {layout-ncol="2"}
::: {.card .text-center .p-3}
[![](slide_icon.png)](DatafestPres_Web.pdf)

[**Presentation Slides (PDF)**](DatafestPres_Web.pdf)
:::
::::
